events.label: Order created
events.description: Fires when a new order is persisted via storefront, POS, manual entry, or channel import.

events.label: Order updated
events.description: Fires when an order status changes through dashboard or automation paths.

events.label: Reservation created
events.description: Public or dashboard reservation hold confirmed on a storefront.

events.label: Waitlist joined
events.description: Guest added to the storefront waitlist queue.

events.label: Waitlist seated
events.description: Host marks a waitlist entry as seated.

events.label: Inventory updated
events.description: Bidirectional Shopify/Woo inventory sync completed with level changes.
